name: Rattan Accent Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) Brass/Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a beautiful accent to your home and illuminate the space in a vintage style with the Rattan Accent Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This accent table features a mushroom-like shape with a round metal base for a standout look you'll love. Made of rattan, this brown table lamp has a woven design for an artistic appeal. The three-way light setting allows you to customize the lighting according to your needs. Simply turn it on and off with the touch-activated sensor.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
